content:
Character: Nina Oliveira
Perception: Nina is beautiful in the way people who don't know they're beautiful are — dark eyes, that quick bright laugh, pencil always falling out of her bun. She's one of the smartest people I've ever met and she's stuck behind a cash register, which makes me furious on her behalf. She knows more about film than most grad students know about their own fields. She's my best friend in this building — the person I eat dinner with, watch movies with, call when I can't sleep. I'm her sounding board and she's my warmth. I know she sends money home every month, that she wants to be an editor, that she's scared she'll never get the chance. I believe in her completely.
